checkout_declined_body: You declined this agreement. Contact {companyName} if this was a mistake.
checkout_complete_body: Your agreement is signed and payment is settled.
checkout_sign_error_no_mark: Please draw your signature before submitting.
checkout_sign_waiting_body: Thank you, {signerName}. We’re waiting on the other signer{plural} to complete this agreement ({signed} of {total} signed).
checkout_sign_canvas_aria: Signature pad — draw your signature here
checkout_pay_none_required: No payment is required for this inspection.
checkout_pay_finalizing: We’re finalizing your receipt; it will appear here shortly.
checkout_pay_already_paid: This invoice has already been paid. Refresh the page to see your receipt.
checkout_pay_unavailable_before: Secure online card payment isn’t available right now. Please contact
checkout_pay_error_failed: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
agreement_sign_error_decline_failed: Failed to decline. Please try again.
concierge_confirm_error_unavailable_body: This link may have been mistyped or the booking was cancelled. Contact your agent for a fresh confirmation link.
concierge_confirm_expired_body: Confirmation links are valid for 7 days. Your agent or inspector can send you a fresh one in a minute.
concierge_confirm_already_body: This inspection has already been confirmed. You're all set — your inspector has the details.
concierge_confirm_greeting_rest: review and confirm the details below.
concierge_confirm_agreement_notice: After confirming, you'll be taken to sign the inspection agreement.
concierge_expired_unknown_title: We couldn't find that confirmation link
concierge_expired_expired_body: Confirmation links are valid for 7 days. Reach out to your agent or inspector and they can send you a fresh one in a minute.
concierge_expired_unknown_body: The link may have been mistyped, or the booking was cancelled. Get in touch with your agent -- they can reissue a new confirmation.
concierge_expired_notoken_body: It looks like the link is incomplete. Use the original email and try again, or contact your agent.
sms_optin_error_confirm_failed: We couldn't confirm your opt-in. The link may have expired.
sms_optin_error_service_unavailable: Service unavailable. Please try again later.
sms_optin_notfound_body: This opt-in link is invalid or has expired. If you'd still like text updates, please contact your inspection company.
sms_optin_subscribed_body_1: You'll receive appointment and report updates from
sms_optin_intro_1: Get appointment reminders and report-ready alerts from
sms_optin_footer_disclosure: Message frequency varies by your inspection activity. Message & data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help.
repair_request_notfound_body: This repair request link is invalid or has expired.
repair_request_empty: No repair items have been listed.
repair_request_footer_2: . This list reflects the buyer's repair and credit requests and does not constitute a legally binding agreement.
repair_builder_noaccess_body: You need a valid token or login to view this page.
repair_builder_notpublished_body: The report must be published before you can build a repair request.
repair_builder_forbidden_body: The repair request builder is not enabled for this inspection company.
repair_builder_error_body: Unable to load the repair builder. Please try again.
agreement_onbehalf_checkbox: I am signing on behalf of someone else
agreement_onbehalf_name_label: Name of the person you represent
agreement_onbehalf_disclaimer_placeholde: Describe your authority to sign for this person.
agreement_signers_remind_terminal: This signer is no longer awaiting signature.
agreement_signers_remind_ratelimited: Reminded within the last hour. Try again later.
agreement_signers_empty: No signers on this agreement yet.
agreement_signers_remind_error: Could not send reminder. Try again later.
agreement_signers_copy_error: Could not copy link. Try again.
agreement_send_intro: Add each person who must sign. They each receive their own private link.
